function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), inspected /99_system per root rulebook, and used canonical cast records for birthday identity.
function.outcome_justification: Using today from context (2026-03-02), the next upcoming birthday month-day among cast birthday fields is 04-04. Canonical file 10_entities/cast/petra.md confirms the exact name Petra Novak with birthday 1988-04-04, and a cast search for 04-04 birthdays returned only that one record.
